name: Bitdefender GravityZone
description: Monitor endpoint security, device inventory, and compliance policies in Bitdefender GravityZone

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log into your Bitdefender GravityZone Control Center
2. Click your username (top-right) and select My Account
3. Scroll to the API keys section and click Add
4. Enter a description (e.g. "Comp AI")
5. Under Enabled APIs, check ALL of the following:
   - Network API
   - Policies API
   - General API
   - Event Push Service API   ← required for the Monitoring & Alerting check
   - Quarantine API
6. Click Generate, then copy the key (it is only shown once)
7. Paste the key here and select your region (Global or EU)

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Your Bitdefender GravityZone API key from MyAccount > API keys in the Control Center

checks.name: Secure Devices
checks.description: Verifies managed endpoints are protected and not infected

checks.name: Device List
checks.description: Lists managed and unmanaged devices in the network inventory

checks.name: Publish Policies
checks.description: Verifies security policies are configured in GravityZone

checks.name: Monitoring & Alerting
checks.description: Verifies that the GravityZone Push Event Service is configured and active for security event monitoring

checks.name: Infrastructure Inventory
checks.description: Checks GravityZone license validity and slot usage
